| | Peter, Thank you for endorsing our grassroots campaign to take on a pillar of the corporate establishment in Washington. This campaign is only possible with the help of volunteers and supporters like you. Join us on our campaign [Discord server](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gn_Z7ce9E5uXhv-xvh-jJIVm8Xgms7nLwnHktHuyblR/3by/Z9XuM2nrTbGvtIlFqga5Rw/h1/laSOSwiFig6TkHfVng9pa_AVRVo0el7SnoWP9ZMnwOM)! You can meet and hang out with other volunteers and supporters. You can also follow us on our social media channels:

* Like our [Facebook Page](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiKuLnDGz9fymsHTR8Ufw3eh/3by/Z9XuM2nrTbGvtIlFqga5Rw/h2/9XtD_Agd5FgJRFTHAdHlj9yScw9DNRXp7RJJF7b0Y6Q)
* Follow us on [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhjCB1Z8H0TLUFI912OKefia88gxgLurgL7yC9xeDeYAz/3by/Z9XuM2nrTbGvtIlFqga5Rw/h3/N0N48HWtwX-3WilVZVOJ4r-ria4lw_61zjpc5lTJxL8)
* Follow us on [Instagra](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/AmCPGAa5TKCV0Ya3nRaidK79-cbxFieyU0EeCmBFsSCnGCvPxJ1IAhZ_LfMpNXnw/3by/Z9XuM2nrTbGvtIlFqga5Rw/h4/MPHAiQ6ZKnSpHDl8oMnAAibzUXfxXQtQs8JYhsX-U5Q)
* Subscribe to our [YouTube channel](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGJEEaASZEa_ZChTFZ_DvDcJXkqNVh5p1WKRqqJDEpywiPUpcroEs15gqY9IiV_pQedG2ckotgWIFA78dXLo27Y/3by/Z9XuM2nrTbGvtIlFqga5Rw/h5/2C8hx4X3toI_wLbvgxlTHn61hzAWMReklEXA4Ss0olk)

Now that you've stepped up to join us, can you donate to make sure this lean, volunteer-led campaign stays on the road? [Pitch in here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5mSXXVi5GptvjtS7ESrtdyFgwo4rtWwult8tSV1Yz5sk/3by/Z9XuM2nrTbGvtIlFqga5Rw/h6/Q04ddmj0lxgZHwbXPVKjleinqbRYwEVL44NYb3AhUDk) Thanks once again for your support! We will be in touch with you soon. If you have any questions, reply to this email and our team will reach out. Talk soon,
Shahid |

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I will always stand with Israel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
I was the Peace President.

[](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlkN2OgyAQhZ9G7zA6-IMXXvRn-xqGwlinETQI2_TtF43bbLLJBMJh5uNwdAdKgFIpdZBDkVdFnQNUZZUVGTTiLIpLPOVf1aU8JWX-Ipvp2cpJP70LZsnUbNKxK9piaPm9bUVbor6rvNRN3VZDhHE-1DKdutH7ZU34KYFbrBVVcJhFnEO9QTZNfiOTBh0pyZ4zWc-GYLWTtJJ9sNhkyHvErdVLq9mL_MhodRInNg4JvwVveoOagkn4FY2kqY861Ju-zsEpjLpSfSwrD11Js0h62HhzBFD1__ELevI02_7v5_vN8WH4lzZbj9ZH2GdCLW-3xvdS1-nlRdNEa93EKB-bvz2_6GCi4d0lzTkBCIF03PaoQAwCuRyAaWzvrGywYK0AYCAqrBEVb-TeDJe4-veCn8kDmu0xbGpz_QGBt6Cs)

Friend,

**When I was in office, I was known as the Peace President.**

Israel's adversaries always knew that the United States stood strongly with Israel and that there would be swift retribution if Israel were under attack.

But, to absolutely no one's surprise, under Joe Biden, the world is getting more violent and more unstable. _Biden is WEAK_ and his lack of support of Israel is leading to new attacks on our allies.

**America must always stand with Israel and make it clear that the Palestinians must end the violence and terror.**

I'm calling on YOU to add your name to the **[Official Petition to Stand with Israel.](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlkN2OgyAQhZ9G7zA6-IMXXvRn-xqGwlinETQI2_TtF43bbLLJBMJh5uNwdAdKgFIpdZBDkVdFnQNUZZUVGTTiLIpLPOVf1aU8JWX-Ipvp2cpJP70LZsnUbNKxK9piaPm9bUVbor6rvNRN3VZDhHE-1DKdutH7ZU34KYFbrBVVcJhFnEO9QTZNfiOTBh0pyZ4zWc-GYLWTtJJ9sNhkyHvErdVLq9mL_MhodRInNg4JvwVveoOagkn4FY2kqY861Ju-zsEpjLpSfSwrD11Js0h62HhzBFD1__ELevI02_7v5_vN8WH4lzZbj9ZH2GdCLW-3xvdS1-nlRdNEa93EKB-bvz2_6GCi4d0lzTkBCIF03PaoQAwCuRyAaWzvrGywYK0AYCAqrBEVb-TeDJe4-veCn8kDmu0xbGpz_QGBt6Cs)**

**[Please sign the Official Petition to Stand with Israel and send a message that America will ALWAYS back our allies.>>](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlkN2OgyAQhZ9G7zA6-IMXXvRn-xqGwlinETQI2_TtF43bbLLJBMJh5uNwdAdKgFIpdZBDkVdFnQNUZZUVGTTiLIpLPOVf1aU8JWX-Ipvp2cpJP70LZsnUbNKxK9piaPm9bUVbor6rvNRN3VZDhHE-1DKdutH7ZU34KYFbrBVVcJhFnEO9QTZNfiOTBh0pyZ4zWc-GYLWTtJJ9sNhkyHvErdVLq9mL_MhodRInNg4JvwVveoOagkn4FY2kqY861Ju-zsEpjLpSfSwrD11Js0h62HhzBFD1__ELevI02_7v5_vN8WH4lzZbj9ZH2GdCLW-3xvdS1-nlRdNEa93EKB-bvz2_6GCi4d0lzTkBCIF03PaoQAwCuRyAaWzvrGywYK0AYCAqrBEVb-TeDJe4-veCn8kDmu0xbGpz_QGBt6Cs)**

_**[OFFICIAL PETITION TO STAND WITH ISRAEL](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlkN2OgyAQhZ9G7zA6-IMXXvRn-xqGwlinETQI2_TtF43bbLLJBMJh5uNwdAdKgFIpdZBDkVdFnQNUZZUVGTTiLIpLPOVf1aU8JWX-Ipvp2cpJP70LZsnUbNKxK9piaPm9bUVbor6rvNRN3VZDhHE-1DKdutH7ZU34KYFbrBVVcJhFnEO9QTZNfiOTBh0pyZ4zWc-GYLWTtJJ9sNhkyHvErdVLq9mL_MhodRInNg4JvwVveoOagkn4FY2kqY861Ju-zsEpjLpSfSwrD11Js0h62HhzBFD1__ELevI02_7v5_vN8WH4lzZbj9ZH2GdCLW-3xvdS1-nlRdNEa93EKB-bvz2_6GCi4d0lzTkBCIF03PaoQAwCuRyAaWzvrGywYK0AYCAqrBEVb-TeDJe4-veCn8kDmu0xbGpz_QGBt6Cs)**_

**SUPPORTER:** | [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlkN2OgyAQhZ9G7zA6-IMXXvRn-xqGwlinETQI2_TtF43bbLLJBMJh5uNwdAdKgFIpdZBDkVdFnQNUZZUVGTTiLIpLPOVf1aU8JWX-Ipvp2cpJP70LZsnUbNKxK9piaPm9bUVbor6rvNRN3VZDhHE-1DKdutH7ZU34KYFbrBVVcJhFnEO9QTZNfiOTBh0pyZ4zWc-GYLWTtJJ9sNhkyHvErdVLq9mL_MhodRInNg4JvwVveoOagkn4FY2kqY861Ju-zsEpjLpSfSwrD11Js0h62HhzBFD1__ELevI02_7v5_vN8WH4lzZbj9ZH2GdCLW-3xvdS1-nlRdNEa93EKB-bvz2_6GCi4d0lzTkBCIF03PaoQAwCuRyAaWzvrGywYK0AYCAqrBEVb-TeDJe4-veCn8kDmu0xbGpz_QGBt6Cs)
---
**DEADLINE: IMMEDIATELY**

**[ADD YOUR NAME NOW>>](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlkN2OgyAQhZ9G7zA6-IMXXvRn-xqGwlinETQI2_TtF43bbLLJBMJh5uNwdAdKgFIpdZBDkVdFnQNUZZUVGTTiLIpLPOVf1aU8JWX-Ipvp2cpJP70LZsnUbNKxK9piaPm9bUVbor6rvNRN3VZDhHE-1DKdutH7ZU34KYFbrBVVcJhFnEO9QTZNfiOTBh0pyZ4zWc-GYLWTtJJ9sNhkyHvErdVLq9mL_MhodRInNg4JvwVveoOagkn4FY2kqY861Ju-zsEpjLpSfSwrD11Js0h62HhzBFD1__ELevI02_7v5_vN8WH4lzZbj9ZH2GdCLW-3xvdS1-nlRdNEa93EKB-bvz2_6GCi4d0lzTkBCIF03PaoQAwCuRyAaWzvrGywYK0AYCAqrBEVb-TeDJe4-veCn8kDmu0xbGpz_QGBt6Cs) **
---

The United States will always strongly support Israel's right to defend itself.

I'm going to review a list with the names of every Patriot who publicly stood with Israel. Will I see your name?

**************[**Add your name RIGHT NOW to the Official Petition to Stand with Israel and get your name on the list I see.**](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlkN2OgyAQhZ9G7zA6-IMXXvRn-xqGwlinETQI2_TtF43bbLLJBMJh5uNwdAdKgFIpdZBDkVdFnQNUZZUVGTTiLIpLPOVf1aU8JWX-Ipvp2cpJP70LZsnUbNKxK9piaPm9bUVbor6rvNRN3VZDhHE-1DKdutH7ZU34KYFbrBVVcJhFnEO9QTZNfiOTBh0pyZ4zWc-GYLWTtJJ9sNhkyHvErdVLq9mL_MhodRInNg4JvwVveoOagkn4FY2kqY861Ju-zsEpjLpSfSwrD11Js0h62HhzBFD1__ELevI02_7v5_vN8WH4lzZbj9ZH2GdCLW-3xvdS1-nlRdNEa93EKB-bvz2_6GCi4d0lzTkBCIF03PaoQAwCuRyAaWzvrGywYK0AYCAqrBEVb-TeDJe4-veCn8kDmu0xbGpz_QGBt6Cs)**************

Thank you,

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: UPDATE: The For The People Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Maybe Republicans should try enacting policies that are popular with the American people.
#

Earlier this week, for the first time, the Senate Rules Committee held a hearing on the _For The People Act_ , and Republican Senators made it abundantly clear that they don’t want to see this legislation pass.
Mitch McConnell said he opposed the bill — which would end right-wing gerrymandering of congressional districts and make it harder to suppress the right to vote — because “if you can write the rules, you can win the game.”
He conveniently left out the fact that **Republicans in many states — including Georgia, Texas, and Florida — are actively working right now to rewrite the rules and rig elections in their favor.**
The _For The People Act_ will merely make our elections fair, not give either party an advantage — though it’s clear Republicans don’t believe they can win elections based on the merit of their own policies, which is a problem entirely of their own making.
Here’s a radical idea: maybe Republicans should try supporting policies that are popular with the American people. **🤷🏿♂️**
Thank you for continuing to fight alongside me on this critical issue. We must keep up the pressure on the Senate to pass the _For The People Act_ — even if it means getting rid of the filibuster.
Onward,
Mondaire
Mondaire is working overtime to fight for democracy reform and a long list of other progressive priorities, but he can’t keep up the fight without your support.

Here’s a radical idea: maybe Republicans should try supporting policies that are popular with the American people. 🤷🏿♂️ Thank you for continuing to fight alongside me on this critical issue. We must keep up the pressure on the Senate to pass the For The People Act — even if it means getting rid of the filibuster. Onward, Mondaire Mondaire is working overtime to fight for democracy reform and a long list of other progressive priorities, but he can’t keep up the fight without your support. = = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

clean_body: It’s going to take all of us to help President Biden build back better. | Did you see this article, Peter? President Biden’s plans to uplift those in need are working. And here’s the proof: hunger rates have plummeted across the country. ****BREAKING NEWS: POLITICO JUST REPORTED THAT HUNGER RATES PLUMMET UNDER PRESIDENT BIDEN.=** For a year, we watched too many Americans fall below the poverty line as our country grappled with the Trump administration’s failed response to the pandemic. Joe Biden’s American Rescue Plan was life-changing — lifting thousands out of poverty and bringing hope back to so many working families. Biden is following through on his promise to rebuild the working class, extending unemployment and continuing increases in food stamp benefits. **But recently we’ve seen Republican-led states actively work to undermine this support. It’s up to us to help spread Biden’s message and get working people the help they need.** ******=****** The work that President Biden, and the entire Biden administration, is doing is just the tip of the iceberg. The American Rescue Plan has completely changed our country and Biden’s American Jobs Plan is the perfect next step to get Americans back to work. **Continuing to help President Biden pass historic legislation to rebuild American means making sure his movement has the foundation of support in the long run.=** President Biden is counting on us to have his back in the fight for our future, and we can’t let him down. subject: Calling all Patriots

body:
Thank a veteran today for Military Appreciation Month!

****
****
Fellow Conservative,

May is **Military Appreciation Month** , so I wanted to give you the chance to thank a veteran this month by signing my official Military Appreciation Month card.

In my time serving in the US Navy all across the globe, I worked with the greatest patriots I have ever met. No sign of gratitude or appreciation is too small to thank these brave men and women. [**So please join me in thanking a veteran this month by adding your name today!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015F0c3D4-PnPwVF1pz8hxcuRupPSqHMDWwBEbtkPtKoyvjZ-cAKtz6gZ7CSK8jV0djPnbnP_-2qmdW2C7Vwp11Y65iHeFgy5CRdlHF8o4hk4_e-JYz3U9pZC8KF8nPNsyBMVpvzsj3SKHpyCf5TibIwsCwehdtlRk3EPU5D-_27la4uGjC10AHNJDfLAx0lX-9HnA95RS0GKIJ9soAMDQ1hif4ClZHla_oAMf1QfDDf9Jm03dI8nc5AQK1N6n1xOwZdf--0btFDcie9HfYQJCoY0-0aEsIJXaftKPZ87XcNpqGRapeaSHOt_0_sJOd-Kr9a6J1yKlHKvR2W0OgzWqzDeOf4v1mbyHrdWARl-jyDT_Jnuf9dkGxsezpKkHqIa7A4ALyawQnsk93-SBe8rCaPNuiI0WybOu-_U2al81R1xNYh49HPN-OA==&c=wz0KEBol4xhTg_s7f7SbyvMHD_v4EhWiLMFHM10P6l-n5nhyIXI_hA==&ch=edauBUysTyifuXjp6YW4ey_Edc8jXrNkPjjMIZAuKd8HeZLjeFWseA==)

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015F0c3D4-PnPwVF1pz8hxcuRupPSqHMDWwBEbtkPtKoyvjZ-cAKtz6gZ7CSK8jV0djPnbnP_-2qmdW2C7Vwp11Y65iHeFgy5CRdlHF8o4hk4_e-JYz3U9pZC8KF8nPNsyBMVpvzsj3SKHpyCf5TibIwsCwehdtlRk3EPU5D-_27la4uGjC10AHNJDfLAx0lX-9HnA95RS0GKIJ9soAMDQ1hif4ClZHla_oAMf1QfDDf9Jm03dI8nc5AQK1N6n1xOwZdf--0btFDcie9HfYQJCoY0-0aEsIJXaftKPZ87XcNpqGRapeaSHOt_0_sJOd-Kr9a6J1yKlHKvR2W0OgzWqzDeOf4v1mbyHrdWARl-jyDT_Jnuf9dkGxsezpKkHqIa7A4ALyawQnsk93-SBe8rCaPNuiI0WybOu-_U2al81R1xNYh49HPN-OA==&c=wz0KEBol4xhTg_s7f7SbyvMHD_v4EhWiLMFHM10P6l-n5nhyIXI_hA==&ch=edauBUysTyifuXjp6YW4ey_Edc8jXrNkPjjMIZAuKd8HeZLjeFWseA==)

The freedoms we all enjoy as Americans are the direct result of the brave men and women who volunteer to keep America safe.

So this month and every month, let us make sure to never take for granted the patriotic service of all the men and women in America's armed forces. [**Add your name today to thank America 's veterans for their selfless service. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015F0c3D4-PnPwVF1pz8hxcuRupPSqHMDWwBEbtkPtKoyvjZ-cAKtz6gZ7CSK8jV0djPnbnP_-2qmdW2C7Vwp11Y65iHeFgy5CRdlHF8o4hk4_e-JYz3U9pZC8KF8nPNsyBMVpvzsj3SKHpyCf5TibIwsCwehdtlRk3EPU5D-_27la4uGjC10AHNJDfLAx0lX-9HnA95RS0GKIJ9soAMDQ1hif4ClZHla_oAMf1QfDDf9Jm03dI8nc5AQK1N6n1xOwZdf--0btFDcie9HfYQJCoY0-0aEsIJXaftKPZ87XcNpqGRapeaSHOt_0_sJOd-Kr9a6J1yKlHKvR2W0OgzWqzDeOf4v1mbyHrdWARl-jyDT_Jnuf9dkGxsezpKkHqIa7A4ALyawQnsk93-SBe8rCaPNuiI0WybOu-_U2al81R1xNYh49HPN-OA==&c=wz0KEBol4xhTg_s7f7SbyvMHD_v4EhWiLMFHM10P6l-n5nhyIXI_hA==&ch=edauBUysTyifuXjp6YW4ey_Edc8jXrNkPjjMIZAuKd8HeZLjeFWseA==)

[**THANK A VETERAN**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015F0c3D4-PnPwVF1pz8hxcuRupPSqHMDWwBEbtkPtKoyvjZ-cAKtz6gZ7CSK8jV0djPnbnP_-2qmdW2C7Vwp11Y65iHeFgy5CRdlHF8o4hk4_e-JYz3U9pZC8KF8nPNsyBMVpvzsj3SKHpyCf5TibIwsCwehdtlRk3EPU5D-_27la4uGjC10AHNJDfLAx0lX-9HnA95RS0GKIJ9soAMDQ1hif4ClZHla_oAMf1QfDDf9Jm03dI8nc5AQK1N6n1xOwZdf--0btFDcie9HfYQJCoY0-0aEsIJXaftKPZ87XcNpqGRapeaSHOt_0_sJOd-Kr9a6J1yKlHKvR2W0OgzWqzDeOf4v1mbyHrdWARl-jyDT_Jnuf9dkGxsezpKkHqIa7A4ALyawQnsk93-SBe8rCaPNuiI0WybOu-_U2al81R1xNYh49HPN-OA==&c=wz0KEBol4xhTg_s7f7SbyvMHD_v4EhWiLMFHM10P6l-n5nhyIXI_hA==&ch=edauBUysTyifuXjp6YW4ey_Edc8jXrNkPjjMIZAuKd8HeZLjeFWseA==)

[**Show your support for America 's military heroes, and their incredible service alongside me and TOP Conservative leaders by signing the card now.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015F0c3D4-PnPwVF1pz8hxcuRupPSqHMDWwBEbtkPtKoyvjZ-cAKtz6gZ7CSK8jV0djPnbnP_-2qmdW2C7Vwp11Y65iHeFgy5CRdlHF8o4hk4_e-JYz3U9pZC8KF8nPNsyBMVpvzsj3SKHpyCf5TibIwsCwehdtlRk3EPU5D-_27la4uGjC10AHNJDfLAx0lX-9HnA95RS0GKIJ9soAMDQ1hif4ClZHla_oAMf1QfDDf9Jm03dI8nc5AQK1N6n1xOwZdf--0btFDcie9HfYQJCoY0-0aEsIJXaftKPZ87XcNpqGRapeaSHOt_0_sJOd-Kr9a6J1yKlHKvR2W0OgzWqzDeOf4v1mbyHrdWARl-jyDT_Jnuf9dkGxsezpKkHqIa7A4ALyawQnsk93-SBe8rCaPNuiI0WybOu-_U2al81R1xNYh49HPN-OA==&c=wz0KEBol4xhTg_s7f7SbyvMHD_v4EhWiLMFHM10P6l-n5nhyIXI_hA==&ch=edauBUysTyifuXjp6YW4ey_Edc8jXrNkPjjMIZAuKd8HeZLjeFWseA==)

Sincerely,

Rear Admiral Ronny Jackson, USN, Ret.
United States Congressman, TX-13

[**THANK A VETERAN**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015F0c3D4-PnPwVF1pz8hxcuRupPSqHMDWwBEbtkPtKoyvjZ-cAKtz6gZ7CSK8jV0djPnbnP_-2qmdW2C7Vwp11Y65iHeFgy5CRdlHF8o4hk4_e-JYz3U9pZC8KF8nPNsyBMVpvzsj3SKHpyCf5TibIwsCwehdtlRk3EPU5D-_27la4uGjC10AHNJDfLAx0lX-9HnA95RS0GKIJ9soAMDQ1hif4ClZHla_oAMf1QfDDf9Jm03dI8nc5AQK1N6n1xOwZdf--0btFDcie9HfYQJCoY0-0aEsIJXaftKPZ87XcNpqGRapeaSHOt_0_sJOd-Kr9a6J1yKlHKvR2W0OgzWqzDeOf4v1mbyHrdWARl-jyDT_Jnuf9dkGxsezpKkHqIa7A4ALyawQnsk93-SBe8rCaPNuiI0WybOu-_U2al81R1xNYh49HPN-OA==&c=wz0KEBol4xhTg_s7f7SbyvMHD_v4EhWiLMFHM10P6l-n5nhyIXI_hA==&ch=edauBUysTyifuXjp6YW4ey_Edc8jXrNkPjjMIZAuKd8HeZLjeFWseA==)

subject: Peter, help us wish Elisa a happy birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Grassroots PAC
body:
electgrassroots.org [electgrassroots.org]It's Elisa's birthday
So we're asking you to help us celebrate by signing our card.
Hi Peter,
Our founder, Elisa Cardnell, is celebrating her birthday today. Please join us by signing our birthday card [https://secure.everyaction.com/qnr9slr1wkeivaIU1MjPQw2] .
It's Elisa's vision that has created a PAC that looks a little different than most. Instead of waiting until our candidates have raised hundreds of thousands of dollars we're working with them on fundraising and running their campaign from the very beginning, when they need our help the most. body:
Gavin Newsom could beat the recall against him... unless YOU step up!

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i5dzRLORFDLjudKcP6VhC-CApwhRxU_pGUCur6XUMPjVXnLkvButggHGiZiO4efF7flOzCvNjmNjlVMGm4KK1f3gvgiWLa9wY5A8LesFceUsLJ-rw41gZnW18fbYfM2kRIV-FOw3ODu16zM3n7CAFLeoDX7if6GwzjEdZq8F_Xi1649pVZQnFOZ86gFPi1D2aip9zdiQvw8MP6Ghw1zkZcTiqNt_S0rYTcVrxornyW3K1b78QgwvjQ8uu1C79XW--vYTNW56bC7Or0NJz0PcHsFGPerIuhM2XExji2mc9WtWDEMADh7OZargftTG3C4fyDqB8H__AiYpjtJ7XR66tgI7nIkGxSbExtbr4CuS6W8id0aHmhdve47UO3PRmnoQlIAEm6gPLfmTGCIxFznw8qH7rgA59kc_Jduh8t2YlqOoqn3h9yPFi2fqI9dT3k62U0J8m5rg5B2sBFNgigO7rg==&c=hsiEF6sDOxQYrP-sUo5rclNlfVOx1-2Osp4YrCyBDXwi9kFIpWD-Bw==&ch=VkFsYJ1WPDHbdzzx1DSXzqLd8o5_VL_uQXgLKvVboTmVAb1CpWynVA==)

Hey, it's Carter, Friend, I wish I was joking when I say this, but Gavin Newsom has a real chance of holding his position DESPITE the recall efforts. Here's four reasons why: 1\. He has raised $4.56 MILLION and counting
2\. He has an additional $2.5 MILLION in the bank
3\. He has a growing list of loyal Democrat elites backing him
4\. He has an ongoing petition to fight the recall movement, backed by his Far Left supporters **If we don 't get all hands on deck IMMEDIATELY, our efforts to recall him will be all for NOTHING. ** I am urging you in the strongest possible terms, Friend, to join our efforts and help send Newsom packing! We've set an ambitious goal to get 750 donations through the door by midnight tonight. If you're one of them, your donation will be **5X-Matched** for maximum impact. [**Are you in?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i5dzRLORFDLjudKcP6VhC-CApwhRxU_pGUCur6XUMPjVXnLkvButggHGiZiO4efF7flOzCvNjmNjlVMGm4KK1f3gvgiWLa9wY5A8LesFceUsLJ-rw41gZnW18fbYfM2kRIV-FOw3ODu16zM3n7CAFLeoDX7if6GwzjEdZq8F_Xi1649pVZQnFOZ86gFPi1D2aip9zdiQvw8MP6Ghw1zkZcTiqNt_S0rYTcVrxornyW3K1b78QgwvjQ8uu1C79XW--vYTNW56bC7Or0NJz0PcHsFGPerIuhM2XExji2mc9WtWDEMADh7OZargftTG3C4fyDqB8H__AiYpjtJ7XR66tgI7nIkGxSbExtbr4CuS6W8id0aHmhdve47UO3PRmnoQlIAEm6gPLfmTGCIxFznw8qH7rgA59kc_Jduh8t2YlqOoqn3h9yPFi2fqI9dT3k62U0J8m5rg5B2sBFNgigO7rg==&c=hsiEF6sDOxQYrP-sUo5rclNlfVOx1-2Osp4YrCyBDXwi9kFIpWD-Bw==&ch=VkFsYJ1WPDHbdzzx1DSXzqLd8o5_VL_uQXgLKvVboTmVAb1CpWynVA==) | [**RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM >> CONTRIBUTE NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i5dzRLORFDLjudKcP6VhC-CApwhRxU_pGUCur6XUMPjVXnLkvButggHGiZiO4efF7flOzCvNjmNjlVMGm4KK1f3gvgiWLa9wY5A8LesFceUsLJ-rw41gZnW18fbYfM2kRIV-FOw3ODu16zM3n7CAFLeoDX7if6GwzjEdZq8F_Xi1649pVZQnFOZ86gFPi1D2aip9zdiQvw8MP6Ghw1zkZcTiqNt_S0rYTcVrxornyW3K1b78QgwvjQ8uu1C79XW--vYTNW56bC7Or0NJz0PcHsFGPerIuhM2XExji2mc9WtWDEMADh7OZargftTG3C4fyDqB8H__AiYpjtJ7XR66tgI7nIkGxSbExtbr4CuS6W8id0aHmhdve47UO3PRmnoQlIAEm6gPLfmTGCIxFznw8qH7rgA59kc_Jduh8t2YlqOoqn3h9yPFi2fqI9dT3k62U0J8m5rg5B2sBFNgigO7rg==&c=hsiEF6sDOxQYrP-sUo5rclNlfVOx1-2Osp4YrCyBDXwi9kFIpWD-Bw==&ch=VkFsYJ1WPDHbdzzx1DSXzqLd8o5_VL_uQXgLKvVboTmVAb1CpWynVA==)
---
The people of California deserve better than Gavin Newsom. When Californians were forced to stay home, he was out partying with his elite friends. When thousands of business owners needed to reopen, he turned a blind eye. When kids needed to go back to school, he sided with the unions over the science.
_Now, our state is struggling, in need of a comeback, and Newsom is nowhere to be found - too busy playing politics with his allies to care about the people he was elected to serve. So now, Californians desperately need Americans like you to stand up for them._
This is how you can. [**Will you join our efforts to recall Gavin Newsom? Anything you can give will be greatly appreciated.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i5dzRLORFDLjudKcP6VhC-CApwhRxU_pGUCur6XUMPjVXnLkvButggHGiZiO4efF8wu1LwbGORPA7gAGJyKcDeusnWDqiSBO05-vSQcs9BOceKvkHe8dy5g1EdI9ROX_QwVbqtm1SjwX0uzbEMRa_0IdMdE-mfpCizgT55I2mFlf8u73E14jGMcpESAnZmraRzGAcnug-yNb7WXTRKgpO9jzMQdbRXcdsgFvGmPgV7nhLFQt0oAglunaRxhiBARaEzb-nVYFlHSIBnzSV46zxd1r85_99p29AZzgmYT24b1HZgNrl7nTCTvNa8saafJJzjgVWXO6xGF907frMO72SvmD5Pv40HlaF1yl_lloSdHFuQnxuD1tYBO3px0RLME-N5zNtEEVCGsZEgpqiyuPF6rzIqWjs4HHtWY_lIKxjObCz8JYXD8McRoaPSRQF0NcqZB_C3wSJRY_KaR0lwZsQg==&c=hsiEF6sDOxQYrP-sUo5rclNlfVOx1-2Osp4YrCyBDXwi9kFIpWD-Bw==&ch=VkFsYJ1WPDHbdzzx1DSXzqLd8o5_VL_uQXgLKvVboTmVAb1CpWynVA==)

body:
GOP extremists are lining up behind Glenn Trumpkin.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29268521/285852239/-2023814932?refcode=20210516_MHQ_5AQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmVkZWM0Mi02ZWI2LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_IvZ2ZbjQK_1VKRLfxQIpD90wBDMXQjr4lMwFYQEmHo=)

| | The Virginia GOP just announced their nominee: Trump-loyalist and self-funding multimillionaire Glenn Youngkin.

And one of Youngkin’s biggest supporters? Disgraced Texas Senator Ted Cruz.

**[Derek, Cruz’s endorsement means Youngkin now has the full force and unlimited resources of the most extreme elements of the National Republican Party. Can you pitch in now to make sure we have the resources it’s going to take to fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29268522/285852240/-2023814932?refcode=20210516_MHQ_5AQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmVkZWM0Mi02ZWI2LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_IvZ2ZbjQK_1VKRLfxQIpD90wBDMXQjr4lMwFYQEmHo=)**

There’s only one reason why extremists like Donald Trump and Ted Cruz are getting into Virginia:

They know the Governor’s race is 2021’s most important. The future of the national Republican Party hangs on whether or not Youngkin wins.

**We can stop them, but it won’t be easy.**

Glenn Youngkin is promising to spend $75 million of his personal wealth to win for Trump and Cruz. With money like that he’ll have unlimited resources to attack Terry and roll back our progress.

**Terry can beat extremists like Glenn Youngkin -- he’s done it before.[Can you chip in now to make sure he has the resources he needs to defeat Trumpism in the Commonwealth?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29268523/285852241/-2023814932?refcode=20210516_MHQ_5AQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmVkZWM0Mi02ZWI2LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_IvZ2ZbjQK_1VKRLfxQIpD90wBDMXQjr4lMwFYQEmHo=)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Oysters, Crabs, Waterfowl, and Clipper Ships
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
From oysters and crabs, to waterfowl and clipper ships, Maryland has always been proudly defined by the Chesapeake Bay. It’s an immeasurable treasure of biodiversity, and one of the world’s most important, productive, and beautiful bodies of water.
But if we’re going to keep it that way, we have much more work to do in tackling the Bay’s significant pollution problems and ecosystem degradation. That’s why as your next Governor, I will implement a bold plan to guarantee the Bay’s health for future generations.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/vb54NIpeKke3SkGy05wFQg2?source=Active [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vb54NIpeKke3SkGy05wFQg2?source=Active]While some progress has been made since the Chesapeake Clean Water Blueprint was established in 2010, there have also been key failings in the effort to protect the Bay. Stronger partnership and accountability mechanisms are needed between the signatory states, the federal government, and stakeholders to ensure that meaningful progress can continue to be made.
When it comes to the Bay restoration effort, my administration will be leading out in front. I’m going to work with President Biden’s EPA and the signatory states to the Chesapeake Clean Water Blueprint to ramp up our efforts to achieve clean air, clean water, and lasting health for the Bay by the end of my first term.
If you think that more needs to be done to protect the Chesapeake Bay, then will you add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to my plan to guarantee a healthy future for the Bay? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vb54NIpeKke3SkGy05wFQg2?source=Active]
As part of my plan, I will add one billion adult oysters in Maryland’s portion of the watershed, and will work with Virginia to secure a similar commitment. And to encourage innovation, I will create an international scientific competition for innovative, affordable solutions to solve the problems of pollution in the Bay.
I will also lead efforts to conserve more land near our waterways to reduce urban and suburban stormwater runoff. Furthermore, I will strengthen the state’s smart growth regulations to combat urban sprawl, and will promote more dense, transit-oriented development. These collective efforts will help protect the Chesapeake Bay from future pollution, while also securing a greener future for our state.
These are just some of the bold solutions I have planned to protect the Bay for future generations. But in order to get there, I’m going to need your support. Will you add your name if you agree with my vision to guarantee a healthy future for the Chesapeake Bay? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/vb54NIpeKke3SkGy05wFQg2?source=Active]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em051621]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c0824147-00b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8/de7ec388-70b6-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTdlYzM4OC03MGI2LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ybxf5uKaBtBpmGM62Yruz4tJR6Rbiq3EGdQAFFvGeV8=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: AOC called the Police on Me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57403704:6jP6hklwN:m:1:3206719985:2817BD5B533E596C1D31291B7316C28E:r "Headline") Peter Everyone be careful, AOC has been triggered. I tried to talk to her the other day, and she literally ran away, and then called the police on me. According to AOC, who champions the defund movement, Congress isn't a "safe space," so a five-foot two-inch woman is scary when she asks you a few questions:
* Why do you hate America?
* Why do you support Antifa?
* Why do you support Hamas terrorists?
* When are you going to debate me on your Green New Deal proposals?

**Now her friend Nancy Pelosi wants me referred to the House Ethics Committee! All for the crime of asking a few questions. Is this still America!?!** **[I need your help to fight back! Will you make your most generous donation of $25, $50 or $100, and help me fend off the radical left attack machine here in Congress?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57403705:6jP6hklwN:m:1:3206719985:2817BD5B533E596C1D31291B7316C28E:r "I
need your help to fight back! Will you make your most generous donation of $25, $50 or $100, and help me fend off the radical left attack machine here
in Congress?")** I'm not Liz Cheney or Mitch McConnell. **I wasn't sent here by the people of Georgia's 14 th District to hold hands and sip tea - I was sent here to fight for our liberty and to stop the slide towards socialism.** I'm here to stop the radical left from destroying our nation and I'm going to confront them on why they have such divergent ideas. I'm quite certain the American people want us discussing ideas, not coddling up to illegal aliens or Hamas terrorists killing innocent children in Israel. _Any Member of Congress who is siding with terrorists over our friends in Israel is literally committing treason. What 's Pelosi doing about that?_ **[I need your help to fight AOC and the radical leftists in Congress! Please donate $50 or more and help me hold them accountable for trying to destroy our nation!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57403706:6jP6hklwN:m:1:3206719985:2817BD5B533E596C1D31291B7316C28E:r "I need your help to fight AOC and the radical leftists in Congress!
Please donate $50 or more and help me hold them accountable for trying to destroy our nation!")** That's right - the same woman who wants to take away your right to own a gun, and defund the police in your neighborhood, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57403704:6jP6hklwN:m:1:3206719985:2817BD5B533E596C1D31291B7316C28E:r "Tweet")**needs armed security and the entire House Ethics Committee to protect her from people asking her questions she doesn't like.** This is what Democrats do when you try to hold them accountable - they hide behind armed guards and call you a racist. They are hypocrites, and they don't scare me. **[If you aren't scared either, then I need you to help me send a message. I am looking for 402 Brave Patriots to stand with me in the next 24 hours and let the leftists know we aggressively champion freedom. Any donation from $5 to $2,900 adds your name to this list.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57403704:6jP6hklwN:m:1:3206719985:2817BD5B533E596C1D31291B7316C28E:r "If you aren't scared either, then I need you to help me send a
message. I am looking for 402 Brave Patriots to stand with me in the next 24 hours and let the leftists know we aggressively champion freedom. Any
donation from $5 to $2,900 adds your name to this list.")** **Together, we will send a message that the snowflakes won't be able to hide from.** AOC is a grown woman - she needs to start acting like it! She needs to start taking the advice of an old Democrat, President Harry Truman, who once said, " If you can't stand the heat, get out of the kitchen!" She can go back to her old job at the bar if she doesn't have the guts to face me, because I love this nation, and I will never stop fighting to preserve our liberty. I don't care if the press calls me a "meany" or I have to hurt someone's feelings to do so, but I'm not going to let them destroy our nation or implement socialism. **[Will you help me hold AOC accountable? I need to know if you are standing with me TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57403704:6jP6hklwN:m:1:3206719985:2817BD5B533E596C1D31291B7316C28E:r "Will you help me hold AOC accountable? I need to know if you are
standing with me TODAY!")** God Bless America, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57403704:6jP6hklwN:m:1:3206719985:2817BD5B533E596C1D31291B7316C28E:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

subject: will you join me?

body:

body:

|
---
| | | Well, Friend, we missed it.

We missed our goal by $982. And while I know that doesn't seem like a lot, this is enough for the Democrats to start plotting how exactly they're going to defeat me.

While I'm disappointed we just missed our goal, I'm more upset that you stayed on the sidelines, Friend.

I unlocked 4X-Matching to show you just how serious I was about reaching this deadline. And now -- with just $982 to go -- I have extended our 4X-Match Deadline for you -- but only for _**[24 hours](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Ky09fUj9YBAKNYv3mw63wwLqA5HfF6xHlSplugi5ocEuDtzZjibvpaz76uXSud6Ur0hdDBeVqbTCKqZFqC4oqFCjWeEckI_OISKiLgOy6uxR1OnnomRz0Zs8fAg4WOajBHtkCwZg4xkU3Pr-lK9jJe-ssJpz0J_-Ohl08eoq3GGC-wym7_4zF9nOGgc2MhghRwxdp8ppGsYxw8x8rouEqd1XA0cNryqH3hpnBHp2VUlajaDrY-mC49UDJi8eptYKyBz4A-AgEcD0lTHa4IB0-WHXfYCWWN6tTvc_6wUp0XYR6QO2wn8kfQAIKvE1jTsyT7Kkol-n5m1JROvHyCwrxTjyw9Ji0b1FJ4heAN9a6GVUR_OnJ1wHfcrt9BQ42n5Tc-0KBE9ICnc41dzBJhoHKJB43S7_p9ELR7cb5faVR47v5d77UsPUA==&c=6b5dKffYEqLK6_NUpbWWqfsXPHMW8ts0E-t33ArFdPCPNxxPQi_eYA==&ch=_Nh6Eq9N04IRnZnsuRNCSWNyEFFzGamwWIWsAei1RW5vpR6HO7znWg== "24 hours")**_. You've seen what a mess the Biden administration has been. Gas prices are skyrocketing, our borders have been thrown open, and Democrats are finding new ways to raise your taxes every day. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. subject: Trump’s social media is here, are you as excited as we are?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
It’s official! Trump created his own social media platform for communicating with his top supporters!

You let us know that you wanted to take a stand against Big Tech censorship!

President Trump responded. It's official! He's created his own social media platform for communicating with his top supporters! [**We want to know on a scale of 1-10, how excited you are for Trump 's Social Media?**](https://action.nrsc.org/petition/president-trumps-social-media-poll/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210516_TY-2.101720_trumps-senate-allies_t1063929-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210516_trumps-social-media-is-here-are-you-as-excited-as-we-are)
_****_

_****_

Your response is crucial to deciding whether or not we provide you with more updates on Trump's social media platform. Please let us know, [**are you excited for President Trump 's Social Media platform?**](https://action.nrsc.org/petition/president-trumps-social-media-poll/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210516_TY-2.101720_trumps-senate-allies_t1063929-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210516_trumps-social-media-is-here-are-you-as-excited-as-we-are)

name: Maxine Waters
subject: Thanks for joining the fight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Waters
body:
| | | Friend,

Thank you for taking the time to sign up and show your support for my reelection campaign. I have to tell you, as someone with the experience and background navigating the legislative process, one thing I know for sure is that nothing can be taken for granted. Your support of my campaign will afford me the resources I need to fight for you in Washington, D.C.

I have devoted my entire life to advancing public policies that promote access to quality healthcare, education, and housing for all Americans. As a senior Member of Congress, I'm working day in and day out to defend progressive values, rein in Wall Street, protect our nation's seniors, and ensure our young people have a path to economic prosperity and the support they need to shape the future and our nation's destiny.

It is my honor to serve California's 43rd Congressional District along with people and communities across the United States. I remain committed to representing your priorities in Congress and at the highest levels of government. I will fight for you!

Stay up-to-date with me on Twitter: https://twitter.com/MaxineWaters
**
[And if you can, chip in $5 or more today to help fuel our movement to resist Trump.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zIVuyXsp5rTLAEOnfMQe7EGtWCudgX5nNk-05jTo8f6KEd_TipLUjv2GFzsUZuN9tgvJWv5cVnMFLCVuM_-jhw/3by/9-OdIIqVReOxbs_K1ySEWg/h0/18jI0wXap8uClvle_WNrEHryQeX7wcFsYGLkBg6b2ac)
**

Sincerely,

Maxine Waters Paid for by Citizens for Waters

clean_body: | | | Friend, Thank you for taking the time to sign up and show your support for my reelection campaign. I have to tell you, as someone with the experience and background navigating the legislative process, one thing I know for sure is that nothing can be taken for granted. Your support of my campaign will afford me the resources I need to fight for you in Washington, D.C. I have devoted my entire life to advancing public policies that promote access to quality healthcare, education, and housing for all Americans. As a senior Member of Congress, I'm working day in and day out to defend progressive values, rein in Wall Street, protect our nation's seniors, and ensure our young people have a path to economic prosperity and the support they need to shape the future and our nation's destiny. It is my honor to serve California's 43rd Congressional District along with people and communities across the United States. I remain committed to representing your priorities in Congress and at the highest levels of government. I will fight for you! Stay up-to-date with me on Twitter: Sincerely, Maxine Waters Paid for by Citizens for Waters | | Sent via . name: MarkKelly.com
subject: we can’t afford to fall short
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — It’s Emma Brown, Mark’s campaign manager.
We’ve been reaching out to you a lot this weekend about our $100,000 goal. I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why it’s so important.
This week, One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona attacking Mark. It’s the latest sign that National Republicans are willing to spend whatever it takes to win back this seat.
We’ve fought against some attack ads already this year, but we know there’s much more to come as we get closer to re-election in 2022.
That’s why every dollar we raise before midnight will help us take on this attack and the next wave of attacks when they come. **So here’s the part where I ask for your help:**
[**Will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign? We can’t afford to fall short of this emergency goal, not when we are being targeted by Mitch McConnell and his allies.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210516-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=607_6688874_BePXKW&akid=607%2E6688874%2EBePXKW)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210516-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=607_6688874_BePXKW&akid=607%2E6688874%2EBePXKW) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210516-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=607_6688874_BePXKW&akid=607%2E6688874%2EBePXKW)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210516-1-subs&t=4&refcode2=607_6688874_BePXKW&akid=607%2E6688874%2EBePXKW) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210516-1-subs&t=5&refcode2=607_6688874_BePXKW&akid=607%2E6688874%2EBePXKW)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210516-1-subs&t=6&refcode2=607_6688874_BePXKW&akid=607%2E6688874%2EBePXKW) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210516-1-subs&t=7&refcode2=607_6688874_BePXKW&akid=607%2E6688874%2EBePXKW)
---|---
Every time we’ve needed your help to prepare or respond to an attack on our campaign, you’ve been there.
And your support is so important — especially right now.
So I can’t thank you enough for your continued support, it means so much to Mark and all of us on Team Kelly.
All of my best,
— Emma
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210516-1-subs&t=8&refcode2=607_6688874_BePXKW&akid=607%2E6688874%2EBePXKW)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=607%2E6688874%2EBePXKW).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

All you have to do to claim your very own copy of The Tyranny of Big Tech is to contribute $75 or more RIGHT NOW. Please contribute $75 or more in the NEXT HOUR to claim your very own copy of The Tyranny of Big Tech. >> CONTRIBUTE $105 CONTRIBUTE $95 CONTRIBUTE $85 CONTRIBUTE $75 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT I know firsthand what Big Tech does to those who threaten their power, but I refuse to be silenced. If you agree with me that Big Tech threatens our liberties and that it’s time to stand up to them, I promise that you’ll enjoy my new book. Please contribute $75 or more RIGHT NOW to claim your copy of The Tyranny of Big Tech. Thank you, Senator Josh Hawley CONTRIBUTE $75 Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.GOP.com

name: Karen Bass
subject: Welcome to the fight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
_From community organizing in South Los Angeles to becoming the first-ever African American woman to preside over a state legislature, Congressmember Karen Bass has a proven track record of fighting for working families. You 're receiving this email because of your support for leaders like her. However, if you don't want to be part of our team, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/cUIXPCg_kqGl7zXaraPiIhpheFF79voCunMuD-CFbhU=/ek1MJn-gQsWnzlRxFegpJDYIK0xQwdO53C0jVXSlaRs=) at any time._

Hello,

I grew up watching the Civil Rights Movement on television with my father. Watching brave American men and women risk it all for equality and justice sparked my lifelong commitment to fighting for social and economic justice.

That commitment took me from community organizing in South Los Angeles to becoming the first-ever African American woman in the United States to serve as a Speaker of a state legislative body. And now, it's taken me to Congress.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cUIXPCg_kqGl7zXaraPiIhpheFF79voCunMuD-CFbhU=/sN8LKcJPT9dwz_8Z4iWsGdmHzqC5vn4t8urlhoOz66I=?gpsid=39_132_15871&refcode=em20_201021_welc1_engg_gq_cust__KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_201021_welc1_engg_gq_cust__KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)
---

Friend, we are fighting for affordable health care for all, criminal justice reform built on rehabilitation, living wages, and an end to police violence. **Every single day in Congress, I 'm fighting for social and economic justice on behalf of the exact same neighborhoods I grew up in. **

**[This team is strong because of folks like you, and I don't want you to miss a moment of our grassroots movement. To get the latest updates, follow along with our efforts on social media.](https://act.myngp.com/el/cUIXPCg_kqGl7zXaraPiIhpheFF79voCunMuD-CFbhU=/GfoTtlXqIeLn7q_g6Lz8nIaVk92N5zirR5sK_pmfFqA=)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cUIXPCg_kqGl7zXaraPiIhpheFF79voCunMuD-CFbhU=/GfoTtlXqIeLn7q_g6Lz8nIaVk92N5zirR5sK_pmfFqA=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/cUIXPCg_kqGl7zXaraPiIhpheFF79voCunMuD-CFbhU=/FJe6dQUGmTmDderdZPisB_EKXhhvwVeA6tqlXbTwZRs=)
---|---
I'll see you out there,

Karen

Karen Bass started as a grassroots organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice a reality for all by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/cUIXPCg_kqGl7zXaraPiIhpheFF79voCunMuD-CFbhU=/sN8LKcJPT9dwz_8Z4iWsGdmHzqC5vn4t8urlhoOz66I=?gpsid=39_132_15871&refcode=em20_201021_welc1_engg_gq_cust__KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_201021_welc1_engg_gq_cust__KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Can you fill out our May issues survey? | | |
---
Hello there, Serving the people of New Hampshire has been the honor of my life. I got in to public service to advocate for families and kids who weren’t getting the support they needed, and to help as many people as I could. One of my most important jobs as Senator is hearing directly from folks on the ground about your thoughts, concerns, and how we can make the government work better for you. Our democracy depends on everyone making their voices heard. **[If you have a minute, can you fill out our May issues survey and share what’s on your mind?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29275200/285875604/-1148973110?utm_source=0516warmup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmQ0N2JiZC04ZWI2LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cb4ZdYIiOgMp0us5E2vFIz3lQyGyE2ps2v1fSMLkbtA=&emci=72f0cd51-8eb6-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=56d47bbd-8eb6-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=5452893)** | | [Take our Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29275201/285875605/-1148973110?utm_source=0516warmup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmQ0N2JiZC04ZWI2LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cb4ZdYIiOgMp0us5E2vFIz3lQyGyE2ps2v1fSMLkbtA=&emci=72f0cd51-8eb6-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=56d47bbd-8eb6-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=5452893)
---
There is critical work ahead to recover from this pandemic, expand access to affordable health care, fight climate change, and so much more. I would love to know what issues are most important to you, friend.
**[Please take a minute (I promise, it will only take a minute) to let me know what your priorities are right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29275202/285875606/-1148973110?utm_source=0516warmup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmQ0N2JiZC04ZWI2LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cb4ZdYIiOgMp0us5E2vFIz3lQyGyE2ps2v1fSMLkbtA=&emci=72f0cd51-8eb6-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=56d47bbd-8eb6-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=5452893)**
Thank you for sharing. Your response makes our democracy—and our country—stronger.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Terry for VA
subject: Glenn Trumpkin wants to Make Virginia Great Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
He’ll bring Trumpism to Virginia.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29276225/285879002/-2023814932?refcode=20210516_WP_5AS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTFmZjc2MS05NWI2LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PUZdwmJRzelQ_ZZXi5mR6pQ57jJhrPFGc6UaowKVw7Y=)

| | He’s a lifetime member of the NRA who would stop all efforts to curb gun violence. A Trump sycophant who has made racist voter suppression laws the centerpiece of his campaign. A self-funding multimillionaire who has promised to pour $75 million of his own fortune into the race.

His name? Glenn Youngkin -- the Trump-endorsed extreme GOP candidate for the Virginia Governor’s office.

According to the _Washington Post_ , Youngkin is no moderate -- not even CLOSE. He’s a Trump Republican whose sole goal is to enact Trump’s policies once he buys his way into the Governor’s office.

**[Will you join the _Washington Post_ in condemning Trumpism in Virginia and pitch in $15, or whatever you’re able, to help Terry stop Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29276226/285879003/-2023814932?refcode=20210516_WP_5AS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTFmZjc2MS05NWI2LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PUZdwmJRzelQ_ZZXi5mR6pQ57jJhrPFGc6UaowKVw7Y=)**

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I know that together we have what it takes to take down Ron Johnson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Hey Peter,

I just got off the phone with my finance team, and I'm a little disheartened by the news I have to share with you all. We only have a few hours left before our mid-month fundraising deadline, and we still haven't reached our $15,000 goal.

When I made the decision to run for Senate, I knew it would be an uphill battle. Ron Johnson has the support of the former president and countless other wealthy backers, so I knew taking him down wouldn't be easy.

But I've beaten the odds before, and I know I can do it again -- with the right team by my side. So I took my grandmother's advice about not asking for permission, and I launched this campaign.

Over the past month, I've seen what this grassroots team could do, and I _know_ that together we have what it takes to take down Ron Johnson. But I need you to step up right now to help me show the naysayers what we can do.

**[If everyone reading this email chips in just $7, we'll meet our $15,000 mid-month goal. clean_body: Hey Peter, I just got off the phone with my finance team, and I'm a little disheartened by the news I have to share with you all. We only have a few hours left before our mid-month fundraising deadline, and we still haven't reached our $15,000 goal. When I made the decision to run for Senate, I knew it would be an uphill battle. Ron Johnson has the support of the former president and countless other wealthy backers, so I knew taking him down wouldn't be easy. But I've beaten the odds before, and I know I can do it again -- with the right team by my side. So I took my grandmother's advice about not asking for permission, and I launched this campaign. Over the past month, I've seen what this grassroots team could do, and I know that together we have what it takes to take down Ron Johnson. But I need you to step up right now to help me show the naysayers what we can do. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Sarah Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Last Chance
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Yesterday, Mark emailed you about our 48-hour fundraising drive to help us raise $100,000 to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s six-figure ad buy.
Then this morning, Mark’s campaign manager, Emma, sent you an email driving home the importance of hitting this goal and defending Mark.
And now, we’re reaching out again because our deadline ends at midnight and we’re extremely close to our goal.
**This is our chance to fight back and send a powerful message to Mitch McConnell and our opponents about the ongoing strength of this campaign.**
So with the clock ticking down, your last minute support could give us the edge we need!
[**Will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign? We can’t afford to fall short of this emergency goal, not when we are being targeted by Mitch McConnell and his allies.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210516-2-15&t=1&refcode2=621_6688874_gCo9sG&akid=621%2E6688874%2EgCo9sG)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210516-2-15&t=2&refcode2=621_6688874_gCo9sG&akid=621%2E6688874%2EgCo9sG) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210516-2-15&t=3&refcode2=621_6688874_gCo9sG&akid=621%2E6688874%2EgCo9sG)

---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210516-2-15&t=6&refcode2=621_6688874_gCo9sG&akid=621%2E6688874%2EgCo9sG) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210516-2-15&t=7&refcode2=621_6688874_gCo9sG&akid=621%2E6688874%2EgCo9sG)
---|---
Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hit this important goal.
Because of your support we will be ready to fight back against anything that Mitch McConnell throws at us.
We couldn’t do it without you!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210516-2-15&t=8&refcode2=621_6688874_gCo9sG&akid=621%2E6688874%2EgCo9sG)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=621%2E6688874%2EgCo9sG).

name: Team Schrier
subject: You don't want to miss this message from Kim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw this message from Kim, Peter.

As a doctor and person living with Type 1 diabetes, the fight to lower prescription drug costs is personal to Kim. That's why she's been working hard in Congress to make sure every person can afford the medication they need.

But a GOP super PAC funded by pharmaceutical companies has launched dishonest attack ads against Kim to replace her with a representative who will put corporate interests before our families' health. If we're going to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority, we need your help to fight back against these attacks right away.

**[Rush a donation before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help us fight back against these attacks and protect Kim's seat.](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9474/72735be7/30befe3e/1e101a15/3342376704/VEsH/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may-2021?gpsid=8_30_18738&refcode=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=1+-+Rush+a+donation+before+our+midmonth+fund")**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
From: Dr. Kim Schrier
Subject: This fight is personal to me
Date: Friday, May 14, 2021

Friends,

Last week, American Action Network, a dark money, GOP super PAC funded by pharmaceutical companies launched dishonest attack ads against me for my work to lower prescription drug costs. This is a fight that is personal to me, so I hope you'll let me take a moment to explain why these attacks are so deeply frustrating.

When I was sixteen years old, I was diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes. Like the other 1.6 million people in this country with Type 1 diabetes, I depend upon insulin to stay alive. However, in the last 20 years, the price of insulin has skyrocketed -- jumping from $40 a vial to upwards of $300 with nothing -- nothing -- to justify this price hike.

Now, I'm one of the lucky ones. I have insurance that helps pay the cost of my insulin. But many of the families I cared for as a pediatrician struggled to afford the medications they relied on. So they'd ration their medication, cut pills in half, or skip taking them altogether. Now, if Americans didn't pay, on average, 3-4 times what people in other wealthy countries pay for their medications, my patients would not have to cut or skip doses.

We need fair pricing, because the best medications in the world won't help if you can't afford to buy them. And the skyrocketing cost of insulins, Humira, and epi-pens simply defies explanation. That is price gouging.

So I said, enough is enough.

**No one should have to choose between putting food on the table and paying for the medication they need. That's why, when I ran for Congress, I promised to take on the soaring price of prescription drugs. And that's exactly what I've been doing.**

I've fought in Congress to keep pharmaceutical companies from raising prices faster than the rate of inflation, to bring cheaper generic drugs to market sooner, and to give Medicare the power to negotiate better prices for all of us. I'll continue fighting until every family can afford the medication they need.

These attack ads are part of a $4 million dollar campaign, and we know this is only the beginning. Dark money groups will do and spend whatever it takes to replace me with a representative who will put their corporate interests before the needs of families in our district. Unlike them, I don't accept corporate PAC money -- I'm counting on you to help me fight back.

**[Will you chip in $5 or more before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help me fight back against these GOP attacks and keep me in Congress fighting to lower the cost of prescription drugs?](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9474/72735be7/30befe3e/1e101a14/3342376704/VEsE/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may-2021?gpsid=8_30_18738&refcode=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+chip+in+5+or+more+before+our+mi")**

Thank you,

Kim

**National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022?** | [DONATE](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9474/72735be7/30befe3e/1e101a17/3342376704/VEsF/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may-2021?gpsid=8_30_18738&refcode=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")
---

Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
---
Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9474/72735be7/30befe3e/1e101a16/3342376704/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://schrier.cp.bsd.net/page/s/update-your-email-address?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&source=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx") We believe emails are an important way to stay in contact with supporters, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9474/72735be7/30befe3e/1e101a09/3342376704/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://schrier.cp.bsd.net/page/s/update-your-preferences?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&source=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx"). Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@drkimschrier.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress on [Facebook](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9474/72735be7/30befe3e/1e101a08/3342376704/VEsA/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://schrier.bsd.net/Facebook?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=6+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&source=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9474/72735be7/30befe3e/1e101a0b/3342376704/VEsB/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://schrier.bsd.net/Twitter?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=7+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&source=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9474/72735be7/30befe3e/1e101a0a/3342376704/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://go.drkimschrier.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=8+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&source=em21_210516_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx") from Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress emails.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Our movement fights for everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, if you're eligible for a survival check, you should receive it.
But in recent weeks, my office started hearing from case managers, local nonprofits, and advocacy groups that hundreds of people experiencing homelessness in the Seattle area had been waiting months to get their checks — critical relief in limbo.
What we heard was that the aid checks individuals are entitled to had never arrived at the offices of community partners where they receive their mail. As we connected the dots, it was clear that this was happening all across the region — and even throughout the country.
So I began investigating why this was occurring and how to fix it. I went straight to the IRS with my inquiries — and last week, the agency agreed to finally lift a hold on numerous addresses where those experiencing homelessness receive their mail.**On Friday, we heard great news from the very same groups who brought this issue to our attention: hundreds of long-awaited survival checks had arrived!**
Peter, this is the kind of necessary work that doesn't always make front-page headlines, but voters elected me to deliver for them. They sent me to Congress to fight for everyone — not to be like some politicians who only care about the wealthy and well-connected. As we take on big challenges, I've always believed that no victory is too small on our path to progress. [**If you can afford it at this time, can you contribute $3 or more to our campaign right now so I can continue to be a voice for everyone in Congress? We're hoping to raise $10,000 by midnight tomorrow to keep our quarterly fundraising on track.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210516?refcode=em20210516-294&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=294_420207_9b6_Fg&akid=294%2E420207%2E9b6_Fg)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210516?refcode=em20210516-294&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=294_420207_9b6_Fg&akid=294%2E420207%2E9b6_Fg)**
I'll never stop fighting for our communities, for everyone in our communities.
Thank you, as always, for your support,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210516-294-footer&t=22&refcode2=294_420207_9b6_Fg&akid=294%2E420207%2E9b6_Fg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=294%2E420207%2E9b6_Fg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=294%2E420207%2E9b6_Fg)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

clean_body: Calling all organizers, staffers, and candidates... NDTC-Logo ( ) Peter – We have some really exciting trainings lined up for next week! Whether you’re organizing your community, working on a campaign, or running for office yourself, you don’t want to miss out! ⇨ First, join us for Earned Media: Writing to Get Coverage ( ) TOMORROW at 1pm ET. This brand new training will teach you the ins and outs of executing a press strategy to land your campaign in the news. RSVP now to learn more about earning the media coverage you need to WIN! ( ) RSVP NOW → ( ) ⇨ Then, if running for office is in your future, don’t miss Do You Want to Run for Office? ( ) on Tuesday, May 18 at 1pm ET. Running for office is a big deal and you’ve probably got a few questions before you toss your hat in the ring. Luckily, we’re here to help! RSVP here to find out if running is right for you! ( ) RSVP NOW → ( ) ⇨ And finally, we’re hosting How to Write Your Stump Speech ( ) on Wednesday, May 19 at 1pm ET. Every candidate needs a stump speech. And a great one is personal, powerful, and persuasive. Click here to RSVP now and learn more about writing a stump speech that will motivate your volunteers, donors, and voters! ( ) RSVP NOW → ( ) — The NDTC Team
